chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4410 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ Disposed of matter: For hearing of CMA No.24889/2024 12.12.2024 Malik Altaf Hussain, advocate for the petitioner along with Mr. Moin Sandeelo advocate Ms. Rabia Khalid, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Abdul Manan, advocate files Vakalatnama of Mr. Faheem Raza Khuhro, which is taken on record. Office has wrongly listed this matter in disposed of cases as the order for disposal does not appear to be discernible from the order sheet. Be that as it may, vide order dated 18.12.2023, the petitioner was directed to submit all the relevant documents to the Adjudicating Authority and the same appears to have been done. As suggested, this petition appears to have served its purpose and disposed of accordingly along with pending application(s). Judge Judge Nadeem/PA
